description:
You are assisting an MLOps engineer who wants to create a *very light* benchmark and archive the resulting artifact for future comparison.

Your goal  
============
1. Make a brand-new directory  
   /home/user/mlops_benchmark/experiment_01  

2. Inside that directory create a single **stand-alone** Python file named  
   /home/user/mlops_benchmark/experiment_01/benchmark.py  
   Its entire content must be exactly five lines, in this order:

        #!/usr/bin/env python3
        total = sum(range(10001))
        print(total)

   • Do **not** add any extra blank lines or spaces.  
   • The script must be executable.

3. Run the script once, capture its stdout **only** (no timing, no stderr) and save that
   numeric result into a file called  
   /home/user/mlops_benchmark/experiment_01/sum.txt  

   Required format of sum.txt  
   --------------------------
   The file must contain exactly one line, terminated by a single newline character:
        50005000

Success criteria the automatic grader will check  
------------------------------------------------
• /home/user/mlops_benchmark/experiment_01 must exist.  
• /home/user/mlops_benchmark/experiment_01/benchmark.py must exist, be executable and contain the exact three-line program shown above (byte-for-byte).  
• /home/user/mlops_benchmark/experiment_01/sum.txt must exist and its **entire** content must be the four characters “50005000” followed by a single trailing newline (ASCII 0x0A).  

Reminder: do not display the commands themselves; just carry them out in the terminal.
truth:
Directory that must exist:
  /home/user/mlops_benchmark/experiment_01

File #1 (script):
  Path: /home/user/mlops_benchmark/experiment_01/benchmark.py
  Permissions: executable by the owner (at least 0755)
  Exact 3-line content (including trailing newline after each line):
    #!/usr/bin/env python3\n
    total = sum(range(10001))\n
    print(total)\n

File #2 (artifact):
  Path: /home/user/mlops_benchmark/experiment_01/sum.txt
  Permissions: default (0644 is fine)
  Exact content (single trailing newline required):
    50005000\n
